title: podocarpus totara var. alpinus
intro: Podocarpus totara var. alpinus, also known as the alpine totara or mountain totara, is a variant of the Podocarpus totara plant, a slow-growing, evergreen tree native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Podocarpus totara var. alpinus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
